chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 750 of 2023 ________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For hearing of CMA No.3425/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 26.02.2025 Mr. Talha Makhdoom, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. Petitioner is stated to be a welfare association, however, no constituent document has been placed on record. The court has not been assisted whether the society is mandated to prefer the litigation presently under consideration. Even otherwise, counsel remained unable to befall the petitioner within the qualification of an aggrieved person per Article 199 of the Constitution and/or whether the disputed question of fact raised is amenable for adjudication in writ jurisdiction. In view hereof, petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
